headline: Stay informed with the top movers within the S&P500 index on Tuesday.

headline: Investors want tokenized Apple stock on the blockchain
summary: Scott Melker discusses investors' push to have tokenized Apple stock traded on the blockchain, Wall Street's latest opposition to DeFi (or decentralized finance), and other top crypto headlines. “The Daily Wolf with Scott Melker” airs on Yahoo Finance every day at 12:00 p.m. Tune in for your daily dose of all things crypto. Make sure to also check out Yahoo Finance's new crypto hub to find the latest crypto-related news.

headline: SEC proposes exemption for tokenizing stocks. What could go wrong?
summary: Scott Melker discusses the US Securities and Exchange Commission's (SEC) proposed innovation exemption for tokenizing securities without the issuer's permission, using Apple (AAPL) stock as an example. “The Daily Wolf with Scott Melker” airs on Yahoo Finance every day at 12:00 p.m. Tune in for your daily dose of all things crypto. Make sure to also check out Yahoo Finance's new crypto hub to find the latest crypto-related news.

headline: US Yields Flirting With 2007 Highs Entice and Divide Investors

headline: Iran war a 'speed bump' for GCC growth, says former Bahrain industry minister
summary: Zayed Alzayani, the Chairman of Alzayani Investments and the former Bahrain minister of industry, commerce and tourism, remains positive on the investment picture in the Gulf. Speaking to CNBC's Dan Murphy at the sidelines of the Citi Pan-Asia conference, Alzayani says that "fundamentals are still very strong in the Gulf" and adds that the GCC remains a "very sound proposition" for investors.
